title: Mid-Class Consonants
description: The nine middle-class consonants — your anchor for the entire tone system.

title: High-Class Consonants
description: Eleven consonants with their own tone pattern, including all the aspirated sounds.

title: Low-Class Consonants
description: The largest class — twenty-four consonants that pair with the high class.

title: Vowels
description: Short and long vowels, and where they attach around a consonant.

title: Tone Rules
description: Put it together: consonant class + vowel length + tone marks = the five tones.

title: Mixed Review
description: Everything together: all forty-four consonants, the vowels, and the full tone system.
